message:
Fix string concatenation and split oversized files

Code quality fixes:
- Fix string concatenation bug (s1 + " " + s2 now works)
- Add type inference for binary operations
- Use std.mem.concat() for string concatenation
- Add allocator detection for string operations

File size compliance (500 line limit):
- Split statements.zig (905 → 25 + 4 modules)
- Split pystring.zig (694 → 50 + 4 modules)
- Split runtime.zig (616 → 316 + 1 module)
- Split lexer.zig (578 → 305 + 1 module)

Test results: 22 → 25 passing (+3 tests)
